---
title: "Introduction to Pirate Shipping"
---

# Welcome Aboard

Welcome to your introductory course on life aboard the pirate ship of media piracy.

In this site, we treat the world of media access like a seafaring adventure. You will explore the reasons people pirate media, the ethical and practical risks involved, and how these choices affect creators, consumers, and culture.

## Course Modules

- **Module 1: The Call of the Sea** — Why some people turn to piracy, from fragmented platforms to archiving censored works.
- **Module 2: The Hidden Reefs** — Why piracy can be unfair, unsafe, and economically complicated.
- **The Captain's Verdict** — A final summary that weighs both sides and asks what kind of future we want.

Navigate the sidebar to jump into each lesson and build your own understanding of this complex topic.
